title: Q.C.V.S.E
description:
QCVSE adds a dynamic economic system to Minecraft.
Trade through the Minazon app, invest your capital, manage a bank account, and face real market fluctuations including crashes and booms.
body:
# 🌍 QCVSE

## 💰 Survival Expansion & A Complete Economic 

QCVSE transforms your Minecraft world into a living economic system with trading, investment, structures and dozens of new items.

## ⚙️ Resource Generation Machines

Automate your production with powerful industrial machines:

- ⛏️ **Drill** – Extract valuable underground resources over time.  
- 🪴 **Grow Tent** – Produce crops and organic materials efficiently indoors.  



## 🛒 Minazon App

A fully functional in-game shopping app.

• 📦 Buy resources dynamically  
• 💵 Instability price system  
• 📈 Market fluctuations  



## 🏗️ Merchant Structures

Three tiers of trading carts spawn in the world:

• 🪵 Small Wagon (Tier I)  
• 🛒 Little Wagon (Tier II)  
• 🚚 Big Wagon (Tier III)  



## 📱 In-Game Applications

• 📊 Investment system with dynamic rates  
• 🏦 Player bank account system  
• 💸 Weekly tax mechanics  
• 📉 Market crashes & rebounds  

The economy is alive and constantly evolving.


## 🧱 Massive Content Additions

• 🪙 New currencies & coins  
• 💎 New ores & materials  
• 🧰 Tools & utilities  
• 📦 Loot crates  
• 🍖 Dozens of new foods  
• 🧪 Crafting components  
• 🏛️ Economic blocks & machines  


## 🎯 Designed For

• Survival players  
• Economy servers  
• Roleplay worlds  
• Trading-focused gameplay  


Build your empire.
Control your wealth.
Survive the crash.

***Don't be greedy !***
